Package org.areslib.core

Class CoordinateUtil

java.lang.Object
org.areslib.core.CoordinateUtil
public class CoordinateUtil extends Object
Utility functions for coordinate conversions, interpolation, and geometry scaling used within the ARESLib framework.

Note: Basic unit conversions (inches↔meters, mm↔meters) are canonical in Units. This class delegates to Units for those and adds geometry/interpolation helpers.

    • lerp

      public static double lerp(double a, double b, double f)
      Linearly interpolates between a and b by percentage f.
      Parameters:
      a - The start value
      b - The end value
      f - The parameter, 0-1
      Returns:
      The interpolated value

    • shortestAngleLerp

      public static double shortestAngleLerp(double a, double b, double f)
      Linearly interpolates between two angles in radians across the shortest path.
      Parameters:
      a - The start angle in radians
      b - The end angle in radians
      f - The parameter, 0-1
      Returns:
      The interpolated angle in radians

    • computeVisionKalmanGain

      public static double computeVisionKalmanGain(double confidence)
      Retrieves the Kalman gain multiplier based on vision confidence.
      Parameters:
      confidence - Camera confidence metric
      Returns:
      Kalman gain scaler
